name: delete_project
description: Permanently delete an Open Design project including its files and conversations. Requires both an explicit project id/name AND confirm:true — there is no active-project fallback because the operation is irreversible.

project.description: Project id (UUID) or name substring. Required — active-context fallback is intentionally disabled.

confirm.description: Must be literally true. Guards against an agent accidentally deleting a project while cleaning up.
